D5 Design L5 Evaluate Reference

Radix 12-Step Scale

a colour scale where every step has a job — backgrounds, borders, the solid, and text — engineered for accessible UI

Radix Colors assigns a fixed role to each of twelve steps: 1-2 page and subtle backgrounds, 3-5 component backgrounds, 6-8 borders, 9 the solid brand fill, 10 its hover, 11-12 low- and high-contrast text. The lightness curve is tuned so step 11 always clears text contrast on steps 1-3.

Set the hue and switch light or dark mode. Step 9 is the saturated solid; the scale is engineered so that semantic roles hold across hues — an approximation of the Radix Colors recipe.
